title: asphyxia mods
description: heavy and unoptimized but cute opinionated modpack for techy players
body:
[this modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods) (modrinth[dot]com/modpack/asphyxia-mods) are the only officially maintained place to download

heavy and unoptimized but cute techy qol modpack techy based on [fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

## for current releases java 25+ is recommended

while this is almost fully client-side (except for a few mods like syncmatica), please make sure that the use of these mods is allowed on the server you want to play on. you can check the full list of included mods under the "dependencies" section of the specific version page [for example](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/version/0.0.2-1.21).

also, keep in mind that the autototem mod changes the client brand to autototem, which server's filters, anti-cheats and admins can see.

key feature is to provide tons of nerdy info and other modifications like:

<details>
<summary>f3-like onscreen lines</summary>

[minihud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- real time and date
- your xyz coordinates and calculated nether variant (or vice versa)
- your facing
- yaw, pitch, and speed
- entity count
- coordinates of the block you're looking at
- blockstate
- in-chunk coordinates and sub-chunk info
- name of the region file
- your ping

[customhud](https://modrinth.com/mod/customhud)
- mc version, modloader name, mods count, and java version
- server brand
- fps, cpu, and gpu usage
- biome and world name
- in-game time and day counter
- local difficulty and clamped local difficulty
- entities rendered and particles
- block light level
- saturation %
- distance to the block you're looking at

</details>

<details>
<summary>inventory</summary>

[inventoryhud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)

- inventory, armor, held items, free slot counter, and arrow counter

[shulkerboxtooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- shulker box tooltip

[peek](https://modrinth.com/mod/peek)

- bees in a bee nest
- marker locations on maps and compasses
- suspicious stew effects
- and more

[item-scroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-scroller)

- shortcuts to move items easier in inventory screens

[inventory-profiles-next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)

- keeps your inventory sorted
- replaces your semi-broken tool
- dumps everything into chests with one click
- moves items that are already in the chest
- locks item slots so sorting ignores them
- keeps locked slots empty
- lets you press R+C to set your shortcuts
- works purely client-side, so it runs everywhere

[invmove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)

- lets you walk around while in inventories

[inventory-tabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-tabs)

- swap to other in-world screens (blocks, entities, etc.) via tabs

[nbtedit-reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbtedit-reborn)

- edit any NBT tags in-game with a GUI

[immersive-tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-tooltip)

- makes tooltips look better
- armor model viewer
- shows item rarity
- displays tooltip paging
- displays food item effects

[mouse-tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)

- enhances inventory management with mouse functions

[inventory-blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-blur)

- adds the 1.20.5 menu background blur to inventories like chests, player inventory, etc.

[rei](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)

- alternative to just enough items/jei

[smooth-scrolling-refurbished](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scrolling-refurbished)

- smooth scrolling for any screen using scrollbars

</details>

<details>
<summary>visuals and shaders</summary>

**continuity**  
- makes connected textures work

**polytone**  
- add more customizations via resourcepacks

**fabrishot**  
- allows super high-res screenshots

**optigui**  
- blazing fast custom gui textures

**fabricSkyboxes**  
- custom skybox textures

**iris shaders**  
- shader mod for better visuals

**model gap fix**  
- fixes small gaps in block models

**cubes without borders**  
- allows you to play in a borderless fullscreen window

**animatica**  
- A mod implementing the OptiFine/MCPatcher animated texture format

**no more purple**  
- allowing you to choose your enchantment glint color

</details>

<details>
<summary>performance</summary>

**sodium**  
- boosts fps, overall performance

**lithium**  
- speeds up game logic

**more culling**  
- cuts down rendering of hidden stuff

**immediatelyfast**  
- speed up immediate mode rendering 

**entity culling**  
- stops rendering entities you can’t see

**enhanced block entities**  
- makes block entities load faster

**ferritecore**  
- lowers memory usage

**fastquit**  
- speeds up quitting time

**modernfix**  
- improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs in modern minecraft versions

**remove reloading screen**  
- gets rid of the reloading screen

</details>

<details>
<summary>hud and ui</summary>

**capes**  
- lets you see optifine and other capes

**reese’s sodium options**  
- gives more sodium settings

**better mount hud**  
- improves the HUD while mounted

**better statistics screen**  
- makes stats screen more useful

**journeymap**  
- adds an in-game map and minimap

**main menu credits**  
- custom credits screen

</details>

<details>
<summary>controls and keybinds</summary>

**macro keybinds**  
- allows macros on keybinds

**controlify**  
- controller support

**invmovecompats**  
- adds compatibility for invmove

**zoomify**  
- adds smooth zoom functionality

**freelook**  
- lets you look around

</details>

<details>
<summary>utility</summary>

**autototem**  
- automatically equips totems

**client side data get**  
- gets client-side data easily

**nbtedit reborn**  
- edit NBT data in-game

**spark**  
- performance monitoring and profiling

**indium**  
- adds compatibility for sodium and other mods

**simple discord rpc**  
- displays in-game status on discord

**resourcify**  
- custom resource pack management

**client time**  
- lets you set a custom client-side time

**say**  
- client side command to say commands in chat as raw text

**automatic infinite elytra**  
- makes you elytra fly using pitch 40 technic

**tweakeroo**  
- lets you tweak a bunch of small settings

**client commands**  
- useful client-side commands

**gamma utils**  
- fullbright feature, no darkness

</details>

recommended versions, java 25+ is required:
- [3.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.4) - [1.21.4](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.4) - lts, most of the features
- [25w14craftmine.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=25w14craftmine) - [25w14craftmine](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_25w14craftmine) - likely one time snapshot thing, many features tho
- [9.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.11) - [1.21.11](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.11) - wip, latest changes
- [10.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=26.1.2) - [26.1.2](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_26.1.2) - wip, many features, latest changes


replaced versions, wont receive any updates:
- [2.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.3) - [1.21.3](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.3), [5.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.6) - [1.21.6](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.6), [6.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.7) - [1.21.7](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.7)

abandoned versions, likely wont receive updates:
- [0.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21) - [1.21](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21) - old, most of the features
- [1.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.1) - [1.21.1](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.1) - old, most of the features
- [4.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.5) - [1.21.5](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.5) - died in wip state
- [7.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.8) - [1.21.8](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.8) - many features but not all
- [8.x.x](https://modrinth.com/modpack/asphyxia-mods/versions?g=1.21.10) - [1.21.10](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_1.21.10) - many features but not all

if you want me to remove your mod, report bugs, complain about low fps, or even help me with this, please contact me on discord
